name: share-file
description: Publish a file to a shareable URL via GitHub gist.
long_description:
Lets Claude share any single file — HTML pages, images, PDFs, screenshots, dashboards, audio, video, source code — by publishing it as a secret GitHub gist and returning a rendered viewer URL. Uses your existing `gh` CLI auth.

Requires `gh` and `jq` installed locally, and `gh auth login` completed.

tools.name: share_file
tools.description: Publish a file from disk to a shareable URL via secret GitHub gist.

tools.name: share_content
tools.description: Publish inline content (string) to a shareable URL via secret GitHub gist.
